---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea to improve WritePilot
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Ex. I'm always frustrated when...

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative approaches or features you've considered?

## Additional context

Any other context, examples, or related issues?

## How would this help you?

- Language learning? Productivity? Accessibility? Something else?

## Priority

- [ ] High (blocker for daily use)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic or future idea)
